# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_command:
        description: 'Build command to execute'
        required: true
        default: 'echo "No build command provided"'

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Validate build command
      run: |
        if [[ "$GITHUB_EVENT_NAME" == "workflow_dispatch" ]]; then
          if [[ "$INPUT_BUILD_COMMAND" =~ [;&|<>] ]]; then
            echo "Invalid characters detected in build command."
            exit 1
          fi
        fi

    - name: Run custom build command
      run: |
        echo "Executing build command..."
        eval "$INPUT_BUILD_COMMAND"
